_note: Combined translations: each standard WLED enum -> per language {name, desc}. Key = English name (join key). Missing -> English fallback. CJK are a first pass (native review welcome). desc = the effect's MOTION FAMILY (see animations/families.json).

en.name: Blink
en.desc: A crisp on/off blink — like an eye.

fr.desc: Un clignotement franc — comme un œil.

de.desc: Ein klares An/Aus-Blinzeln — wie ein Auge.
